allow: Bash(node -e "const x = require\('google-ads-api'\); const api = new x.GoogleAdsApi\({client_id:'a', client_secret:'b', developer_token:'c'}\); const cust = api.Customer\({customer_id:'123', refresh_token:'rt'}\); console.log\('adGroupCriteria type:', typeof cust.adGroupCriteria\); console.log\('ops:', Object.keys\(cust.adGroupCriteria || {}\).slice\(0,15\)\);")
